prompt: For a protein engineering research program, engineer a selective protein binder targeting Fusion glycoprotein F (viral fusion glycoprotein (countermeasure target)) expressed by Human respiratory syncytial virus. The binder should achieve nanomolar affinity. describe a strategy for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using AlphaFold2, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Please include key design considerations and expected challenges.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Fusion glycoprotein F; organism: Human respiratory syncytial virus; catalogue version v1.0
